title: 购物
description_uz: «Nima sotib olding?» — ikki do'stning kiyim, narx, rang va chegirma haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog xarid haqida so'rash, narxlarni qo'shish va yoqtirgan rangni aytishni mashq qiladi. Tanish mavzu va do'konda kerak bo'ladigan foydali so'zlar. Rolni o'ynab takrorlash va ravon gapirishga o'tish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Что ты купил?» — разговор двух друзей об одежде, цене, цвете и скидке. Этот диалог отрабатывает вопросы о покупках, сложение цен и упоминание любимого цвета. Знакомая тема и полезные слова для магазина. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры и перехода к беглой речи.
description_en: «What did you buy?» — two friends chatting about clothes, price, colour, and a sale. This dialogue practises asking about purchases, adding up prices, and naming a favourite colour. A familiar topic with words you'll need in any shop. Perfect for role-play and moving toward fluent speech.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhōu mò qù nǎr le?
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari qayerga bording?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where did you go on the weekend?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qù shāng chǎng mǎi yī fu le.
sentences.text_translation: Savdo markaziga kiyim olishga bordim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я ходил в торговый центр за одеждой.
sentences.text_translation_en: I went to the mall to buy clothes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ mǎi le shén me?
sentences.text_translation: Nima sotib olding?
sentences.text_translation_en: What did you buy?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我买了一件毛衣和一条裤子。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ mǎi le yí jiàn máo yī hé yì tiáo kù zi.
sentences.text_translation: Bitta jemper va bitta shim sotib oldim.
sentences.text_translation_en: I bought a sweater and a pair of pants.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo kàn ma?
sentences.text_translation: Chiroylimi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do they look nice?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很好看。毛衣是红色的，裤子是黑色的。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo kàn. Máo yī shì hóng sè de, kù zi shì hēi sè de.
sentences.text_translation: Juda chiroyli. Jemper qizil, shim qora.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень красивые. Свитер красный, брюки чёрные.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very nice. The sweater is red, and the pants are black.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Guì bu guì?
sentences.text_translation: Qimmatmi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Were they expensive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不贵。毛衣一百二十块，裤子八十块。
sentences.pinyin: Bú guì. Máo yī yì bǎi èr shí kuài, kù zi bā shí kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas. Jemper bir yuz yigirma yuan, shim sakson yuan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не дорого. Свитер сто двадцать юаней, брюки восемьдесят.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive. The sweater was 120 yuan, the pants 80 yuan.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yí gòng liǎng bǎi kuài! Hěn pián yi a!
sentences.text_translation: Jami ikki yuz yuan! Juda arzon-ku!
sentences.text_translation_en: Two hundred yuan in total! That's very cheap!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Duì, yīn wèi shāng chǎng zài dǎ zhé.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, chunki savdo markazida chegirma bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, потому что в торговом центре скидки.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, because the mall is having a sale.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Dǎ zhé dǎ dào shén me shí hou?
sentences.text_translation: Chegirma qachongacha?
sentences.text_translation_en: Until when is the sale?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 到这个月底。你也可以去看看。
sentences.pinyin: Dào zhè ge yuè dǐ. Nǐ yě kě yǐ qù kàn kan.
sentences.text_translation: Shu oy oxirigacha. Sen ham borib ko'rsang bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: До конца этого месяца. Ты тоже можешь сходить посмотреть.
sentences.text_translation_en: Until the end of this month. You can go take a look too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn wài tào.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham bitta ustki kiyim olmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'd like to buy a coat too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那个商场有很多外套，颜色也很多。
sentences.pinyin: Nà ge shāng chǎng yǒu hěn duō wài tào, yán sè yě hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation: U savdo markazida ko'p ustki kiyim bor, ranglari ham ko'p.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В том торговом центре много курток, и цветов тоже много.
sentences.text_translation_en: That mall has lots of coats, and lots of colors too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xǐ huan shén me yán sè?
sentences.text_translation: Qaysi rangni yoqtirasan?
sentences.text_translation_en: What color do you like?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan lán sè hé bái sè.
sentences.text_translation: Men ko'k va oq rangni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like blue and white.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也喜欢蓝色。我们下午一起去看看吧！
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xǐ huan lán sè. Wǒ men xià wǔ yì qǐ qù kàn kan ba!
sentences.text_translation: Men ham ko'k rangni yoqtiraman. Tushdan keyin birga borib ko'raylik!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже люблю синий. Давай сходим вместе посмотреть после обеда!
sentences.text_translation_en: I like blue too. Let's go take a look together this afternoon!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ zhèng hǎo méi shì.
sentences.text_translation: Mayli! Men aynan bo'shman.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure! I happen to be free.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那下午两点，商场门口见。
sentences.pinyin: Nà xià wǔ liǎng diǎn, shāng chǎng mén kǒu jiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Unda tushdan keyin soat ikkida, savdo markazi oldida uchrashamiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда в два часа дня встретимся у входа в торговый центр.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then let's meet at the mall entrance at two in the afternoon.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, xià wǔ jiàn!
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, tushdan keyin ko'rishamiz!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, see you this afternoon!
sentences.speaker: B
